name: Gifts for a Guard
desc_clean: Stygian Guard 3 Induction into the Guard is considered each Stygian’s last step before becoming a fully mature member of the Sea.
mechanic_summary: Gifts for a Guard to Spell klanu Stygian Guard. Stygian Guard 3 Induction into the Guard is considered each Stygian’s last step before becoming a fully mature member of the Sea. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Stygian Guard 3 Induction into the Guard is considered each Stygian’s last step before becoming a fully mature member of the Sea. They are asked to give up all possessions and only carry the tools of their creed. A different life than I would prefer to lead, but most likely much more honorable.
